zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecily Bardolf於1324年出生在英國諾福爾可喬加時，她的父親Sir Thomas Bardolf II42歲，母親Agnes de Grandison35歲。她於1344年3月6日與William de Morley 3rd Baron Morley在英國諾福爾可喬加結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1386年11月23日在英國諾福爾可諾維其享年62歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可諾維其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecily Bardolf于1324年出生在英国諾福爾可喬加时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Bardolf II42岁，母亲Agnes de Grandison35岁。她于1344年3月6日与William de Morley 3rd Baron Morley在英国諾福爾可喬加结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1386年11月23日在英国諾福爾可諾維其享年62岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可諾維其。

nameMeanings.name: Cecily
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecily Bardolf was born in 1324, in Wormegay, Norfolk, England, her father, Sir Thomas Bardolf II, was 42 and her mother, Agnes de Grandison, was 35. She married William de Morley 3rd Baron Morley on 6 March 1344, in Wormegay, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 23 November 1386, in Norwich, Norfolk, England, at the age of 62, and was buried in Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecily Bardolf est née en 1324, à Wormegay, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Bardolf II, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Grandison, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé William de Morley 3rd Baron Morley le 6 mars 1344, à Wormegay, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 23 novembre 1386, à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cecily Bardolf 1324 in Wormegay, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Bardolf II 42 und ihre Mutter Agnes de Grandison 35. Sie hat am 6. März 1344 in Wormegay, Norfolk, England William de Morley 3rd Baron Morley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 23. November 1386 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Norwich, Norfolk, England und wurde in Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily Bardolf è nata il nel 1324 nel Wormegay, Norfolk, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas Bardolf II, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Agnes de Grandison, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato William de Morley 3rd Baron Morley il 6 marzo 1344, nel Wormegay, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 23 novembre 1386, nel Norwich, Norfolk, England, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolta a Norwich, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecily Bardolfが1324年にイギリスノーフォルクウオルメガイで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Bardolf IIは42歳，母Agnes de Grandisonは35歳であった。1344年3月6日にイギリスノーフォルクウオルメガイでWilliam de Morley 3rd Baron Morleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1386年11月23日にイギリスノーフォルクノーウィチで62歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクノーウィチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecily Bardolf(이)가 1324년 영국 노르폴크 워메가이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Bardolf II(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes de Grandison(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1344년 3월 6일 영국 노르폴크 워메가이에서 William de Morley 3rd Baron Morley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1386년 11월 23일 영국 노르폴크 노위치에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 노위치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily Bardolf nasceu em 1324, em Wormegay, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Bardolf II, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Grandison, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Morley 3rd Baron Morley em 6 de março de 1344, em Wormegay, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 23 de novembro de 1386, em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecily Bardolf родилась в 1324 г. в местности вормегеи, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Bardolf II было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Grandison, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Morley 3rd Baron Morley 6 марта 1344 г. в местности вормегеи, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 23 ноября 1386 г. в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cecily Bardolf nació en 1324, en Wormegay, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Bardolf II, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Agnes de Grandison, tenía 35 años. Se casó con William de Morley 3rd Baron Morley el 6 de marzo de 1344, en Wormegay, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 23 de noviembre de 1386, en Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultada en Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
